restaurant.name: The Golden Nugget
restaurant.description: A cosy bar & restaurant in the heart of Fossa, Killarney, serving hearty Irish classics, fresh seafood, stone-baked pizza and a great pint.
restaurant.subtitle: Bar & Restaurant, Fossa, Killarney

items.name: Soup of the Day
items.description: Fresh creamy soup of the day served with a crusty white roll.
items.chefNote: A rotating favourite — ask your server for today’s selection.

items.name: Seafood Chowder
items.description: Creamy seafood chowder with a hint of dill, served with a crusty roll.
items.chefNote: Creamy, rich and loaded with local seafood.

items.name: Minestrone Soup
items.description: Hearty Italian vegetable soup with pasta and fresh herbs.
items.chefNote: Finished with a swirl of cream and fresh herbs.

items.name: Tomato & Basil Soup
items.description: Slow-roasted tomato soup finished with fresh basil and a swirl of cream.
items.chefNote: Served piping hot with our freshly baked bread roll.

items.name: Garlic Bread
items.description: Grilled ciabatta with seasonal garnish; add cheese for a little extra.
items.chefNote: Warm, buttery and impossible to resist.

items.name: The Golden Wings
items.description: Chicken wings tossed in our own special sauce. Gluten-free option available.
items.chefNote: Tossed in our secret house glaze for the perfect sweet-heat balance.

items.name: Deep Fried Brie
items.description: Crispy deep-fried brie served with berry compote and seasonal garnish.
items.chefNote: Crisp outside, molten inside — a real crowd-pleaser.

items.name: Vol au Vent
items.description: Sautéed chicken strips and bacon in a light puff-pastry case with a creamy sauce.
items.chefNote: A retro classic done the proper way.

items.name: BBQ Golden Ribs
items.description: Tender BBQ ribs served with salad, chips and coleslaw.
items.chefNote: Ideal for sharing or enjoying all to yourself.

items.name: Homemade Breaded Scampi
items.description: Golden breaded scampi served with salad and a sweet chilli dip.
items.chefNote: One of our most requested opening dishes.

items.name: Toasted Goat's Cheese Salad
items.description: Toasted goat's cheese with beetroot, walnut and house salad.
items.chefNote: Light, fresh and full of texture.

items.name: Classic Caesar Salad
items.description: Grilled chicken, strips of bacon, parmesan shavings and croutons on crisp romaine.
items.chefNote: Dressed with our house vinaigrette just before serving.

items.name: House Garden Salad
items.description: Fresh mixed leaves, tomato, cucumber and red onion with our house dressing.
items.chefNote: A bright, balanced plate from the garden.

items.name: Greek Salad
items.description: Feta cheese, olives, tomato, cucumber and red onion with oregano dressing.
items.chefNote: Light, fresh and full of texture.

items.name: Bacon & Avocado Salad
items.description: Crispy bacon, ripe avocado, cherry tomatoes and mixed leaves with honey-mustard dressing.
items.chefNote: Dressed with our house vinaigrette just before serving.

items.name: The Jobber
items.description: 8oz chargrilled house burger in a grilled bun with bacon, cheese, lettuce, tomato, onion and house sauce.
items.chefNote: Our signature burger: stacked, juicy and built for appetite.

items.name: The Valley Steak Sandwich
items.description: Sautéed onions and mushrooms with sliced steak, served in toasted bread with pepper sauce or garlic butter.
items.chefNote: A hearty, satisfying plate for the hungry guest.

items.name: Steak of the Day
items.description: Sirloin, ribeye or fillet from our specials board, served with chips, mash, sautéed onions and mushrooms, pepper sauce or garlic butter.
items.chefNote: Ask your server for today’s cut and cooking recommendation.

items.name: Southern Fried Chicken Burger
items.description: Crispy chicken fillet with lettuce, tomato, cheese, red onion and relish.
items.chefNote: Cooked to order and served with our signature sides.

items.name: Thai Red Curry Chicken
items.description: Aromatic Thai red curry chicken served with basmati rice and naan bread.
items.chefNote: Fragrant, creamy and gently spiced.

items.name: Half Roast Duck
items.description: Roast duck with orange and star anise sauce, mashed potatoes and mixed vegetables.
items.chefNote: Slow-roasted until the skin is crisp and the meat is tender.

items.name: Traditional Fish & Chips
items.description: Fresh white fish in a homemade batter served with chips and peas. Gluten-free option available.
items.chefNote: Beer-battered haddock served with twice-cooked chips and mushy peas.

items.name: Grilled Salmon Fillet
items.description: Lightly grilled salmon fillet with lemon butter, seasonal vegetables and potatoes.
items.chefNote: Simply grilled and finished with lemon butter.

items.name: Seafood Linguine
items.description: Linguine pasta tossed with mixed seafood in a white wine, garlic and tomato sauce.
items.chefNote: Served with lemon and our house tartare.

items.name: Garlic King Prawns
items.description: Sizzling king prawns in garlic butter, served with crusty bread and a fresh salad.
items.chefNote: Sourced responsibly and cooked simply to let the fish shine.

items.name: Penne Carbonara
items.description: Sautéed chicken and strips of bacon in a creamy carbonara sauce with parmesan shavings and garlic bread.
items.chefNote: Silky sauce, crispy pancetta and plenty of parmesan.

items.name: Spaghetti Bolognese
items.description: Slow-cooked beef ragu with tomatoes and herbs tossed through spaghetti.
items.chefNote: A slow-cooked ragu that tastes like Sunday.

items.name: Penne Arrabbiata
items.description: Penne in a spicy tomato sauce with garlic, chilli and fresh basil.
items.chefNote: One of our kitchen favourites any night of the week.

items.name: Lasagne al Forno
items.description: Layers of pasta with slow-cooked beef ragu, béchamel sauce and melted cheese.
items.chefNote: Made with slow-simmered sauces and al dente pasta.

items.name: Creamy Chicken & Mushroom Pasta
items.description: Tender chicken and mushrooms in a creamy parmesan sauce with tagliatelle.
items.chefNote: A generous bowl of comfort, finished with parmesan.

items.name: Margherita
items.description: Neapolitan tomato sauce and melted mozzarella on a stone-baked base.
items.chefNote: Stone-baked until crisp and blistered.

items.name: Triple Cheese
items.description: Red cheddar, mozzarella and goat's cheese on a rich tomato base.
items.chefNote: Topped with quality ingredients and plenty of cheese.

items.name: The BMC
items.description: Bacon, mushroom and cheese on our house tomato base.
items.chefNote: Best enjoyed fresh from the oven.

items.name: Nduja
items.description: Spicy Italian sausage, tomato, peppers and mozzarella.
items.chefNote: Stone-baked until crisp and blistered.

items.name: Classic Pepperoni
items.description: Pepperoni and mozzarella on a classic tomato base.
items.chefNote: A classic done right with cup-and-char pepperoni.

items.name: Veggie Delight
items.description: Mushrooms, peppers, red onion, sweetcorn and mozzarella.
items.chefNote: Best enjoyed fresh from the oven.

items.name: Chickpea & Butterbean Curry
items.description: Chickpea and butterbean curry served with rice and poppadom.
items.chefNote: Hearty, aromatic and completely plant-based.

items.name: Mixed Vegetable Stir Fry
items.description: Fresh mixed vegetable stir fry served with rice. Gluten-free.
items.chefNote: Fresh vegetables in a light ginger-soy glaze.

items.name: Mixed Vegetable Curry
items.description: Mixed vegetable curry served with rice and poppadom. Gluten-free.
items.chefNote: One of the most colourful plates on the menu.

items.name: Roasted Vegetable Lasagne
items.description: Layers of roasted vegetables, tomato sauce, béchamel and cheese baked until golden.
items.chefNote: Packed with flavour and built around seasonal vegetables.

items.name: Grilled Halloumi & Avocado Wrap
items.description: Grilled halloumi, avocado, roasted peppers and hummus in a warm tortilla.
items.chefNote: A satisfying plant-based option that does not compromise.

items.name: Guinness Draught
items.description: A creamy pint of the black stuff.
items.chefNote: The perfect pint: creamy, bitter and iconic.

items.name: Heineken
items.description: Crisp, refreshing draught lager.
items.chefNote: The perfect pour to accompany your meal.

items.name: Orchard Thieves Cider
items.description: Refreshing Irish cider served ice-cold.
items.chefNote: A refreshing choice from our drinks selection.

items.name: Coca-Cola
items.description: Classic Coca-Cola served over ice.
items.chefNote: Served ice-cold, exactly as it should be.

items.name: Fresh Orange Juice
items.description: Chilled freshly squeezed orange juice.
items.chefNote: The perfect pour to accompany your meal.

items.name: Sparkling Water
items.description: Chilled sparkling water with a slice of lemon.
items.chefNote: A refreshing choice from our drinks selection.

items.name: Warm Chocolate Fudge Cake
items.description: Rich chocolate fudge cake served warm with vanilla ice cream.
items.chefNote: Decadent, warm and best shared — if you can.

items.name: Apple Crumble
items.description: Bramley apple crumble served with custard.
items.chefNote: Prepared in-house and served with pride.

items.name: New York Cheesecake
items.description: Creamy vanilla cheesecake with a berry compote.
items.chefNote: Best paired with a strong coffee.

items.name: Sticky Toffee Pudding
items.description: Sticky date sponge with butterscotch sauce and vanilla ice cream.
items.chefNote: A proper pud with butterscotch sauce and vanilla ice cream.

items.name: Ice Cream Selection
items.description: Three scoops of vanilla, chocolate and strawberry ice cream.
items.chefNote: Prepared in-house and served with pride.
